BRANCH.COMMENT: --- VE-1229 --- do logic for challenge-code or id

MAP.NAME: %createChallengeSocialinteractionRequest/challenge-code%==/[^ ]/ && %createChallengeSocialinteractionRequest/challenge-id% ==/[^ ]/
MAP.COMMENT: do nothing as challengecode and challengeId both are present in input

INVOKE.COMMENT: call challenges table to get code

MAP.COMMENT: get challenge code mapped to input doc

INVOKE.NAME: $default
INVOKE.COMMENT: if size less than or equal to zero

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Challene-Id not present in Database. Details: %results/message%

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg
Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Not able to fetch details from challenge table: Details: %results/message%

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

SEQUENCE.NAME: %createChallengeSocialinteractionRequest/challenge-code%==/[^ ]/ && %createChallengeSocialinteractionRequest/challenge-id% !=/[^ ]/
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --- VE-1229 ---get challenge id and updated DB

BRANCH.COMMENT: --- VE-1274 Populate chalengeID only if SI is of type Group ---

INVOKE.COMMENT: call challenges table to get code

MAP.COMMENT: -- Map challengeId in the input doc ---

INVOKE.NAME: $default
INVOKE.COMMENT: if size less than or equal to zero

Values.value: Both ChallengeId and ChallengeCode are null. Please provide either one of these fields.

record.name: type

BRANCH.COMMENT: check whether member can create a social interaction

SEQUENCE.NAME: %challengeSocialDetail/socialQuantityRemaining%>0
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: if member still can create social interaction

MAP.COMMENT: get size of friends list and set socialCirclesLimit to OK

BRANCH.COMMENT: check whether space is there for adding member to interaction

MAP.NAME: %friendsSize%<=%challengeSocialRs/socialSize%
MAP.COMMENT: space is there in group to add friends

MAP.NAME: $default
MAP.COMMENT: space is not there in group to add friends

Values.value: Allowed friends limit has been exceeded.
Allowed social circles has been reached!

MAP.COMMENT: map to social interaction Entity doc
check friends size and map to social interaction doc

BRANCH.COMMENT: check status of springboot api call

SEQUENCE.NAME: %responseListSize%>0&&%results/status%=='200'
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: api call is success and challenge details exists

INVOKE.NAME: INFLUENCER
INVOKE.COMMENT: get challenge periods for INFLUENCER type

INVOKE.NAME: $default
INVOKE.COMMENT: get challenge periods for GROUP type

BRANCH.COMMENT: check status of springboot api call

SEQUENCE.NAME: %responseListSize%>0&&%results/status%=='200'
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: api call is success and challenge period details exists

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Unable to retrieve challenge periods data from DB. Error: %results/message%
